metadata.title: Hong Kong EOR Services - Employer of Record Hong Kong
metadata.description: Hong Kong EOR and Employer of Record services. Hire employees in Hong Kong without your own company. Employment Ordinance, MPF, salaries tax reporting, statutory holidays 2026, and employment visa support. Book a demo.
keywords: hire employees in Hong Kong without entity

faqs.title: Hong Kong EOR FAQs
faqs.subtitle: Quick answers on MPF, tax reporting, timelines, and Employment Ordinance compliance for Employer of Record in Hong Kong.

items.question: How much does Hong Kong EOR cost?
items.answer: Hong Kong EOR pricing typically includes a monthly management fee per employee plus gross salary, employer MPF contributions (and any optional benefits you fund). Salaries tax is generally the employee’s liability with IR56 reporting obligations on the employer.we support compliant payroll and filings. Book a demo for a tailored quote.

items.question: How fast can I hire someone in Hong Kong with EOR?
items.answer: Local hires with right to work in Hong Kong often onboard within roughly 3–10 business days once contracts, MPF enrolment, and payroll details are complete. Expatriates needing an employment visa usually take longer while Immigration Department processing runs ask us for a realistic timeline for your candidate profile.

items.question: Do I need a Hong Kong company to use EOR?
items.answer: The purpose of Hong Kong EOR is to employ staff through a compliant local employer so you are not required to incorporate a Hong Kong limited company for your first hires. You retain day-to-day management of the role; we handle employment, MPF, payroll, and core HR compliance under the Employment Ordinance.

items.question: What is MPF and who pays it?
items.answer: The Mandatory Provident Fund (MPF) scheme requires employer and employee contributions for most employees (subject to exemptions such as certain short-term visitors). Rates and caps are set by law and trustees administer accounts. We enrol eligible employees, remit contributions, and maintain records.

items.question: Can you support Hong Kong employment visas?
items.answer: For overseas nationals, an appropriate visa (for example General Employment Policy or other routes) is usually required before work begins. We coordinate documentation with you and immigration specialists where needed. Eligibility depends on qualifications, salary, and employer sponsorship confirm for each hire.
